description_short: Silky tofu in a fiery Sichuan chili bean sauce with numbing peppercorns.
description_marketing: A legendary Sichuan classic — tender cubes of silken tofu swimming in a bold, spicy chili bean paste sauce, numbed to perfection with Sichuan peppercorns for that iconic mala sensation.

description_short: Tender diced chicken wok-tossed with roasted peanuts and dried chilies in a sweet-savory sauce.
description_marketing: The dish that conquered America — juicy chicken morsels stir-fried to perfection with crunchy roasted peanuts, aromatic dried chilies, and a masterful balance of sweet, savory, and tangy flavors.

description_short: Crispy-skinned roast duck served with thin pancakes, hoisin sauce, and fresh vegetables.
description_marketing: The crown jewel of Beijing cuisine — whole duck roasted to lacquered, crispy perfection, carved tableside and wrapped in delicate pancakes with sweet hoisin sauce and crisp vegetables.

description_short: Delicate steamed dumplings filled with savory pork and hot, rich broth.
description_marketing: Shanghai's greatest gift to dumpling lovers — hand-pleated, tissue-thin wrappers holding a treasure of seasoned pork and impossibly rich soup that bursts warm in every bite.

description_short: Wok-seared wide rice noodles with tender beef and bean sprouts in savory soy sauce.
description_marketing: The smoky wok hei magic of Hong Kong streets — silky wide rice noodles charred at high heat with tender beef strips, crisp bean sprouts, and the unmistakable depth of dark soy.

description_short: A bold, peppery broth with silky tofu, tender pork, and earthy mushrooms.
description_marketing: The yin-yang of Chinese soups — a punchy, soul-warming bowl where fiery white pepper meets tangy black vinegar, loaded with silken tofu ribbons, tender pork shreds, and cloud-like egg blossoms.

description_short: Crispy golden rolls filled with seasoned pork and shredded vegetables.
description_marketing: The crunch heard 'round every Chinese table — golden-fried wrappers crackling to reveal tender shredded pork and crisp vegetables, perfectly paired with sweet chili dipping sauce.

description_short: Wok-hei kissed fried rice with shrimp, BBQ pork, egg, and colorful vegetables.
description_marketing: A symphony in a wok — each grain of rice separately kissed by flame, mingling with succulent shrimp, sweet char siu pork, golden egg threads, and a garden of diced vegetables.

description_short: Tender fish fillets poached in a blazing Sichuan chili oil broth with numbing pepper.
description_marketing: Don't let the name fool you — this is not boiled but baptized in fire. Silky fish fillets float in a sea of electrifying chili oil, crowned with sizzling dried chilies and tongue-tingling Sichuan peppercorns.

allergens.name: Soybeans
allergens.source: hoisin sauce, soy sauce, red fermented tofu

description_short: Cantonese-style honey-glazed barbecue pork with a shiny, caramelized red crust.
description_marketing: The ruby jewel of Cantonese barbecue — pork shoulder marinated in a secret blend of sweet and savory seasonings, slow-roasted to sticky, lacquered perfection with a signature crimson glaze.
